montage-login-description: You will be redirected to Meta-Wiki in order to confirm your identity. Montage will not publish anything on Wikimedia projects using your account.
montage-login-account-instructions: If you don't have a Wikimedia account, you can create one on {0}.
montage-manage-all: View all campaigns, active and archived below
montage-view-active: view only active campaigns and rounds.
montage-description-campaign-url: Enter URL of campaign landing page, e.g., on Commons or local Wiki Loves.
montage-description-date-range: Once the images are imported to the first round, changing date and time won't affect the images your jury can view. However, changing these values before the import to round 1 will ensure that only photos uploaded before the end date and time are visible to your jury.
montage-description-campaign-coordinator: Coordinators are people who have access to edit the campaign, rounds, and round statistics.
montage-required-campaign-coordinators: At least one coordinator is required
montage-description-round-stats: Whether to show own voting statistics (e.g. number of accepted or declined images) of juror for the round.
montage-description-round-quorum: The number of jurors that must vote on each image
montage-description-round-jurors: Enter the username of the juror you want to add to this round.
montage-round-stats-description: Whether to show own voting statistics (e.g., number of accepted or declined images) of juror for the round.
montage-round-delete-confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this round?
montage-round-source-category-help: Category on Wikimedia Commons that gathers all contest images. Example: Images from Wiki Loves Monuments 2017 in Ghana.
montage-round-source-csv-help: List of files saved as CSV and uploaded as a Google Sheet or Gist.
montage-round-source-selected-help: List of files, one each line without File: prefix.
montage-round-jurors-description: Enter the username of the juror you want to add to this round.
montage-round-quorum-description: The number of jurors that must vote on each image
montage-vote-contact-organizer: This round is not active. Please contact the organizer.
montage-vote-keyboard-instructions: You can also use the keyboard to vote.
montage-vote-no-images: You voted on all images in this round. You can still edit your previous votes using the button below.
montage-vote-no-images-warning: WARNING - there is a chance that your browser is still loading the next tasks. Please check the main page of Montage to verify if 'your progress' is indeed 100%.
montage-no-votes-this-round: You haven't voted on any image this round.
montage-at-least-one-user: Please add at least one user
permission-denied-message: You do not have the required permissions to access this page.
unsaved-changes-confirmation: There are unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
campaign-request-form-subtitle: Fill in the details below. A coordinator will review your request and follow up with your tracking ID.
campaign-request-field-commons: Contest landing page or Commons category
campaign-request-field-commons-hint: Used to cross-verify competition rules and prevent duplicate requests.
campaign-request-field-purpose-placehold: Explain the context and goals of this campaign.
campaign-request-field-coordinator-hint: Must be a valid, registered Wikimedia Commons account with SUL (Single User Login).
campaign-request-utc-notice-body: Please double-check that you have entered UTC times and not your local time. This is the most common source of errors.
campaign-request-volume-low-warning: Fewer than 30 images — a spreadsheet may be more efficient than Montage for campaigns this small. Consider whether Montage is the right tool.
campaign-request-volume-low-detail: Very low image count. Consider advising the requester to use a spreadsheet instead.
campaign-request-user-not-found-error: This Wikimedia account was not found. Please verify the username.
campaign-request-submit-error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
campaign-request-submitted-body: Your campaign request has been received. A coordinator will review it and get back to you.
campaign-request-address-clarification: Please address the coordinator's feedback and resubmit.
campaign-requests-subtitle: Track and manage campaign creation requests.
campaign-request-approved-notice: This request has been approved and the campaign has been created.
campaign-request-clarification-note: The coordinator has sent you a note:
campaign-request-approve-description: Approving will automatically create the Montage campaign and assign the listed coordinator.
campaign-request-approve-success: Campaign created successfully and request marked as approved.
campaign-request-advise-description: Send the requester a note asking them to clarify or correct their submission. The request will be marked as 'Needs clarification' and the requester can resubmit using their tracking ID.
campaign-request-advise-placeholder: Write your note to the requester here…
campaign-request-advise-hint: This note will be visible to the requester on their request page.
campaign-request-advise-success: Note sent. The request has been marked as needing clarification.
campaign-request-low-volume-advice: This campaign estimates fewer than 30 images. You may want to advise the requester to use a spreadsheet instead of Montage.
campaign-request-template-low-volume: Your estimated image count is below 30. For smaller contests, a simple spreadsheet is usually more efficient than Montage. Would you like us to recommend an alternative, or do you expect the image count to grow?
campaign-request-template-check-dates: Please double-check your start and end dates. The times entered appear to be in local time rather than UTC. Could you confirm or correct them? You can use timeanddate.com/worldclock/converter to convert your local time to UTC.
campaign-request-template-missing-info: Thank you for your request. We need a bit more information before we can proceed. Could you provide more detail about the purpose of this campaign and the Commons category or landing page it corresponds to?
validation-close-after-open: End date must be after start date.
load-error: Could not load the request. Please try again.
action-error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
